## Runtime.RuntimeVersion.getIngredients() method

Gets ingredients, optionally filtered.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getIngredients(filter?: RecipeIngredientsFilter[]): Result<IterableIterator<IResolvedFillingIngredient<AnyRuntimeIngredient>>>;
```
